policy_name: Richtlinien der Universität Passau über die Gewährung von Reisekostenzuschüssen

rules.description: Maximum 2/3 of the incurred costs can be covered.
PhD students, postdocs, and junior professors of the University of Passau are eligible.
rules.logic_hint: applicant_type IN ('PhD student', 'Postdoc', 'Junior Professor') AND applicant_affiliation = 'University of Passau'

rules.description: Active participation in a scientific event with an independent scientific contribution is required.
Participation in courses, seminars, colloquia, or organizational functions is not funded.
Applications must be submitted before the trip.
The expense report must be submitted within six months of the event.
